task_completion.description: Create an observation point at Brasília, Brazil
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the QField map interface centered near Brasília, Brazil (approx coordinates -15.78, -47.93) with the point creation tool active or a newly created point visible on the map.

task_completion.description: Set the required attributes for the Brasília observation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a QField feature attribute form or data entry screen showing the text 'Rivera' for Observer, 'habitat_survey' for Type, and 'Cerrado biome assessment - dry season' for Notes.

task_completion.description: Create an observation point at Lima, Peru
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the QField map interface centered near the coastal area of Lima, Peru (approx coordinates -12.05, -77.04) with a new point being added. This is harder as there may be no existing map marker for Lima, so verify the geographic location on the map.

task_completion.description: Set the required attributes for the Lima observation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a QField feature attribute form showing the text 'Rivera' for Observer, 'habitat_survey' for Type, and 'Coastal desert transition zone' for Notes.

task_completion.description: Create an observation point at Buenos Aires, Argentina
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the QField map interface centered near Buenos Aires, Argentina (approx coordinates -34.60, -58.38) with a new point being added or selected.

task_completion.description: Set the required attributes for the Buenos Aires observation
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a QField feature attribute form showing the text 'Rivera' for Observer, 'habitat_survey' for Type, and 'Pampas grassland fringe monitoring' for Notes.

integrity.description: The agent used the QField graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show the actual QField Android application interface (map view, crosshairs, attribute forms) rather than a terminal window or SQLite command-line interface.

integrity.description: The agent navigated the map to the correct geographic regions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the map background corresponds to the correct South American regions (Brazil, Peru, Argentina) when points are being created, rather than points being dropped blindly on a blank or incorrect map area.

integrity.description: The agent entered attributes into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the attribute text is entered into QField's native feature identification/editing forms, not just typed into a separate text editor or note-taking app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target GeoPackage is located at /sdcard/Android/data/ch.opengis.qfield/files/world_survey.gpkg. A proximity threshold of 2.0 degrees is used to verify point locations.
